headline: AMETEK (AME) Is Up 7.6% After Record Backlog And New M&A Push – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: AMETEK recently reported a record backlog of US$3.58 billion and outlined plans to deploy US$100 million into targeted growth initiatives, while reaffirming its focus on mergers and acquisitions to diversify its portfolio. Management also highlighted that roughly one-third of recent revenue growth comes from new products, underscoring how its innovation pipeline is feeding into a growth-through-acquisition model that many professional investors, including Mario Gabelli, view as central to...
